title: Junior Business Development Manager at My Home Group

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at My Home Group
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Business Development Manager looking for your next big career move? My Home Group in Vijayawada offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About My Home Group:
My Home Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with My Home Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
